messages.content: 很抱歉插嘴，只是担心你错过了Candy的信息。附件6-30货期后已采购的纸箱和日期，因今年订单较少，所以工厂采购纸箱比较早，烦请帮忙申请先用掉这些纸箱，后续会按照培训要求用新规格的纸箱，非常感谢！根据以上信息，帮我发一封英语邮件给steve。

Subject: Candy Order - Urgent Information

Dear Steve,

I apologize for interrupting your day, but I am very concerned that you may have missed some important information regarding the Candy order. Attached is a document that outlines the recent purchases of cardboard boxes, including the delivery dates. Due to the low number of orders this year, the factory has procured the boxes earlier than expected. We kindly request that you use up these boxes before switching to the new specifications in the training requirements.

Thank you for your attention to this important matter.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Dear Whitney and May,

Centric Brands had some questions recently about the polybag standards in the new instructions, compared to customer end user standards.  This is causing some confusion for the factories.  

Can we double check each of the end user customer packaging standards for specific polybag requirements (material and size tolerance requirement), and if they are of a higher standard than our 1 mil, can we create a table similar to the corrugated end user customer requirements and list out the differences as well.  Then we can put it into the intro packet and SOPs, similar to the corrugate end user instructions.

Is this something we can have completed by Thursday?
这是什么意思
这封邮件是询问Whitney和May是否能够在周四之前检查每个最终用户的包装标准，特别是对于聚乙烯袋的材料和尺寸公差要求是否有更高的标准。如果有更高的标准，他们希望可以创建一个表格，类似于瓦楞纸板最终用户客户要求的表格，将不同之处列出来，并将其放入介绍包和标准操作程序中。整个邮件是为了解决最终用户和工厂之间的标准化问题，以便更好地满足所有客户的要求和需求。
请提供需要翻译的内容。

Dear Whitney and May,

Centric Brands had some questions recently about the polybag standards in the new instructions, compared to customer end user standards. This is causing some confusion for the factories.

Can we double check each of the end user customer packaging standards for specific polybag requirements (material and size tolerance requirement), and if they are of a higher standard than our 1 mil, can we create a table similar to the corrugated end user customer requirements and list out the differences as well. Then we can put it into the intro packet and SOPs, similar to the corrugate end user instructions.

Is this something we can have completed by Thursday?

亲爱的Whitney和May，

最近Centric Brands对新说明书中的聚乙烯袋标准与客户最终用户标准之间存在一些疑问。这导致工厂产生了一些困惑。

我们能否再次核对每个最终用户客户的包装标准，特别是关于聚乙烯袋的材料和尺寸容差要求？如果客户的标准比我们的1毫米标准更高，我们能否创建一个类似于瓦楞纸板最终用户客户要求的表格，并列出差异。然后，我们可以将其放入介绍包和SOPs中，类似于瓦楞纸板最终用户的说明书。

这是我们能否在周四之前完成的任务吗？
"SOPs"是"Standard Operating Procedures"的缩写，意为标准操作程序，它是指组织或公司为了实现固定业务目标而制定的、内容特定的思路和行动的规范化、标准化方案。它通常被用于规范和统一组织内部的操作流程和标准，以确保组织或公司运作的高效性和一致性。
对我来说，收到的最多反馈就是大部分供应商已经订购了出厂日期在七月份之后的纸箱了，我已经把它总结到在一个excel表格里了。怎么告诉tim，用英语

You have received feedback from most suppliers that they have already ordered cardboard boxes with a delivery date beyond July. I have summarized this information in an Excel spreadsheet. How should I convey this message to Tim?
对我来说，收到的最多反馈就是大部分供应商已经订购了出厂日期在七月份之后的纸箱了，我已经把它总结到在一个excel表格里了。怎么发邮件告诉tim，用英语

Subject: Update on Suppliers' Orders for Cardboard Boxes

Dear Tim,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to inform you that I have received feedback from most of our suppliers regarding the orders for cardboard boxes. The majority of them have already placed orders for boxes with a delivery date beyond July. I have summarized this information in an Excel spreadsheet for your reference.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need any further information on this matter. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

All packaging component materials should be readily recyclable, compostable, or biodegradable by consumers in the areas where the product will be sold.
Rigid PVC plastic (vinyl) is not readily recyclable by consumers; therefore, rigid PVC is not acceptable (see 4.2.1). Virgin and recycled paper are equally sustainable environmentally. Virgin fibers offer greater strength - high-performance paperboard made primarily from virgin fiber often provides a sustainability advantage by enabling source reduction. 你好，请问以上的话是什么意思呢
以上话的意思是，产品使用的全部包装组件材料应该是易于消费者在销售地点进行回收、可堆肥或可生物降解的。刚性PVC塑料（乙烯基）不是易于消费者回收的材料，因此不可接受（见4.2.1条款）。原纸和再生纸在环境上是同样可持续的。但原始纤维提供更高的强度 - 主要由原始纤维制成的高性能纸板通常通过实现源头减少来提供可持续性优势。

Please see below the update. ELG already done all steps and Rosetti also, just CAITE does not do C44ECT test. So if I need to update you for ELG and Rosetti in this matter, or if I need to update you other something? 什么意思，帮我优化一下句子

以下是最新的更新，请查看。ELG和Rosetti已经完成了所有步骤，只有CAITE没有进行C44ECT测试。因此，我需要向您更新ELG和Rosetti在这个问题上的最新情况，还是我需要向您提供其他方面的更新信息？为了表达更清晰明了，句子可以用以下方式改写：Please find the following update: ELG and Rosetti have already completed all the required steps, while CAITE has not conducted the C44ECT test. Should I provide you with an update regarding ELG and Rosetti's progress on this matter, or do you require additional updates from me?
